com.delphix.masking.api.plugin

Interface DiscoveryClassifier<T>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    PluginComponent, PropertyConfigurable

    public interface DiscoveryClassifier<T>
extends PluginComponent, PropertyConfigurable
    This is the primary interface implemented by all automated sensitive data discovery classifiers. The parameter is determined by the type of classifier. Classifiers should be stateless, other that what state is built during setup, and MT-safe after setup.
    Since:
    1.11.0

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  DiscoveryClassifier.ClassificationResult 
      static class  DiscoveryClassifier.Confidence 
      static class  DiscoveryClassifier.Target 
      static interface  DiscoveryClassifier.TextDataSample

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      DiscoveryClassifier.ClassificationResult classify(T value)
      The contents of the values list depends on the Target of the classifier: PATH - Some number of path names describing the location of the data in the schema or data format.
      DiscoveryClassifier.Target getClassificationTarget()
      This method determines the type of classifier the class implements, and the input Object type for the classify(Object) method.
      default void setup(DiscoveryClassifierService serviceProvider)
      Perform any setup needed, including ingestion of data files and similar time-consuming work.

      Relinquish any resources this classifier has acquired during its operation and reset any results gathered.

    • Method Detail

      • getClassificationTarget

        DiscoveryClassifier.Target getClassificationTarget()
        This method determines the type of classifier the class implements, and the input Object type for the classify(Object) method.
        Returns:
        The type of input this classifier expects.

      • classify

        DiscoveryClassifier.ClassificationResult classify(T value)
        The contents of the values list depends on the Target of the classifier: PATH - Some number of path names describing the location of the data in the schema or data format. For databases, this will be schema_name, table_name, column_name. For delimited files, it will be a single value containing the field name. DATA - This will a list of actual data values. DATA_DATES - This will a list of LocalDateTime objects constructed from the dates in the data columns. GENERIC_TYPE - This will be a list of two value: type and a numeric length of the column or field. SQL_TYPE - Just an idea for now - a classifier that sees the raw SQL type, would be DB specific.
        Parameters:
        value - The value(s) to classify.
        Returns:
        The classification results

      • setup

        default void setup(@Nonnull
                   DiscoveryClassifierService serviceProvider)
        Perform any setup needed, including ingestion of data files and similar time-consuming work.
        Parameters:
        serviceProvider - The service interface providing callbacks for the classifier to use.

      • tearDown

        default void tearDown()
        Relinquish any resources this classifier has acquired during its operation and reset any results gathered.

      • validate

        default void validate(GroupedProperties properties)
               throws ComponentConfigurationException
        Throws:
        ComponentConfigurationException

        default void validateRegexPattern(java.lang.String pattern,
                                  int patternProperties)
                           throws ComponentConfigurationException
        Throws:
        ComponentConfigurationException
